query:
-- Encerrar o preço antigo vinculado ao responsável 90001
UPDATE billing_system_unit_prices 
SET ends_at = '2026-05-18 00:00:00'
WHERE financial_responsible_id = 90001 AND unit_id = 210001 AND ends_at IS NULL;

-- Criar novo preço para o responsável erica (120001) com o mesmo valor R$ 5,00
INSERT INTO billing_system_unit_prices (financial_responsible_id, unit_id, price_per_report, starts_at, ends_at, created_by, createdAt)
VALUES (120001, 210001, '5.00', '2026-05-18 00:00:00', NULL, 1, NOW());
